description: A bus driver reports that their automated next-stop announcement system has failed.

nodes.task_description: Receive a radio call from a driver about the announcement system failure.

expected_outcome.value: The dispatcher logs the vehicle defect.

nodes.task_description: Instruct the driver to manually announce all stops for the remainder of their trip to ensure ADA compliance.

expected_outcome.value: The driver is given clear instructions to maintain service accessibility.

nodes.task_description: Create a maintenance work order for the bus to have the announcement system repaired at the end of the day.
